title: SENIOR FARM DIRECT APPLICATION FOR FARMERS & FARM STANDS - 211info
text: OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION SENIOR FARM DIRECT APPLICATION FOR FARMERS & FARM STANDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides the online application to participate in the Senior Farm Direct Nutrition program. Offers a phone line for farmers and farm stands to apply and to find more information about the program. 800 NE Oregon Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Farmers and farm stands are eligible if they meet the following criteria: Farmers: Own, lease, rent, or sharecrop land to grow, cultivate, or harvest crops on land in Oregon or a bordering county in another state and sell their produce at a farmers market or farm stand. Farmers Markets: -Meet consistently at defined locations throughout the season - Have at least three market vendors throughout the season who grow, cultivate, or harvest fresh fruits, vegetables, or cut culinary herbs in Oregon or a bordering county in another state, and have at least one FDNP authorized Farmer available during all FDNP season operating hours. To be listed in the online directory, farmers markets must: -Complete and submit an application each season -New market or new market manager needs to participate in a brief video call orientation -Sign a one-year agreement -Receive program materials packet in the mail from the state Farm Direct team Hours: Website: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (877) 807-0889 2 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 673-1222 Main phone (971) 673-1299 FAX 711 TTY/TTD (800) 422-6012 Toll-free Main phone (877) 807-0889 ext 2 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call to apply FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Vendor Certification Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES -
